class.name: iros_llm_rviz_tool/SendLlmGoalTool
class.description: Click-to-send LLM goal. Pick a point on the map, choose a robot group, dispatch LlmCommand{mode=mapf} on /llm/command.

class.name: iros_llm_rviz_tool/PlaceObstacleTool
class.description: Left-click to place a circle, rectangle, or door obstacle. Right-click to remove the nearest placed obstacle.

class.name: iros_llm_rviz_tool/DoorTool
class.description: Left-click to open the door specified by Door ID property. Right-click to close it.
